text: Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: The iron never lies to you.
author: Henry Rollins

text: Be stronger than your excuses.
That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Earned, not given.
The body achieves what the mind believes.
Pain is weakness leaving the body.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
A lion does not concern himself with the opinion of sheep.
Hard times create strong men.
You don't find willpower. You build it.
Every rep. Every set. Every day.
Complacency is the enemy of progress.
Show up when it's hard. That's the whole game.
Iron sharpens iron.
The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: Joseph Campbell

text: Strength is built in the moments you want to quit but don't.
Be the kind of person that makes others raise their standards.
Tough times never last. Tough people do.
author: Robert H. Schuller

text: You are harder than you think. Prove it.
